description:
Phonetic Bangla keyboard (TSF input method) for Windows — type Bangla in any app.

Amader Bangla Keyboard is a Windows input method (TSF Text Input Processor)
for typing Bangla phonetically: type romanized Bangla (e.g. "amar" -> আমার)
in any application. It includes live composition, a Bangla/English toggle
(Ctrl+Shift+B), a built-in typing guide, and word suggestions backed by a
~65,000-word dictionary that learns your choices. x64, x86, and ARM64.
